title: Pork Saltimbocca with Italian Flair
description: A classic Italian dish with a spicy twist, featuring pork cutlets, prosciutto, and sage. This recipe is a fusion of traditional flavors with a spicy kick.
instructions: Season pork cutlets with saltimbocca seasoning, if using.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
Add sliced Italian sausage and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove sausage from skillet and set aside.
Add remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil to skillet.
Add pork cutlets and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer pork to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add sliced prosciutto and cook until crispy, about 1 minute.
Add chopped sage and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add chicken broth and white wine to skillet, scraping up any browned bits.
Return pork to skillet and simmer until coated in sauce, about 2-3 minutes.
Serve pork with sauce spooned over the top. Garnish with additional sage leaves, if desired.
